desc: Add a user as an app collaborator

app_id.desc: The ID of the app to attach the collaborator to.

user_id.desc: The ID of the user to add as a collaborator.

user_email.desc: The email of the user to add as a collaborator.  This email has to be associated with a slack user in the workspace.

permission_type.desc: Defines what level of access this collaborator should have to the app.

app_not_found.desc: The given app cannot be found.

app_not_owned_by_manager_app.desc: The specified app is not managed by the calling manager app.

user_not_found.desc: The given user cannot be found.

cannot_list_collaborators.desc: Calling user is unable to list collaborators.

cannot_add_collaborator.desc: Calling user is unable to add collaborators

user_already_owner.desc: The user is already a collaborator for this app

invalid_permission_type.desc: The given permission type is not a valid value
